releaseNotes: Per-event reminders are now multi-select — attach 1 day + 1 hour + 5 min before a single event, or pick None to opt out. Adds 2 hr / 4 hr / 2 days / 1 week to the offset options. Also bundles every v2.12.x calendar improvement since the last landing-page bump: multi-day events render across every day they span (ribbons on the month grid, adaptive time text on the day list), Today pill on the month header, long-press a date to quick-add, swipe-left an event to delete, all-day toggle, discard-confirm guard, Material 3 date/time pickers, inline conflict warning, real-time SSE sync of web/phone calendar changes.
